name: operator-differential-expression-r
description: Built-in atomic operator plugin: multi-comparison differential expression with DESeq2/edgeR/limma priority and default plots.

interface.longDescription: Provides one atomic differential-expression operator for feature-by-sample matrices and sample metadata groups. For count matrices it prioritizes DESeq2, edgeR, then limma-voom; for quantitative matrices it prioritizes limma; Wilcoxon, chi-square, Welch, and pooled t-tests remain available as explicit methods or fallbacks. It supports explicit or all-pair group comparisons and writes volcano, quadrant, or beeswarm display plots.
defaultPrompt: Expose the differential expression plugin and run it with my matrix and metadata.
